title: More Kills More Damage
description: Each kill increases the player's damage. Now the player will always be able to fight back!
body:
## Description
Each kill increases the player's damage. Now the player will always be able to fight back!

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vzMutOip/images/75e92eabdbcbc9647473e1782d60bfdd694ca97e.jpeg)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
